articles.title: BoE DMP Survey: UK firms anticipate easing inflation, improved employment outlook
articles.snippet: The Bank of England (BoE) released the results of its February Decision Maker Panel (DMP) survey on Thursday, based on responses from 2,042 Chief Financial Officers of UK firms collected between February 6 and February 20.

articles.title: A piece of Hollywood history: Gorgeous Palm Springs estate once owned by Cary Grant listed for $12.7 million
articles.snippet: Known as Villa Paradiso, the sprawling Spanish Revival compound holds a special place in the actor’s family history, having served as his favorite retreat for many years.

combined_text:
[0.67] BoE DMP Survey: UK firms anticipate easing inflation, improved employment outlook
The Bank of England (BoE) released the results of its February Decision Maker Panel (DMP) survey on Thursday, based on responses from 2,042 Chief Financial Officers of UK firms collected between February 6 and February 20.

[0.33] A piece of Hollywood history: Gorgeous Palm Springs estate once owned by Cary Grant listed for $12.7 million
Known as Villa Paradiso, the sprawling Spanish Revival compound holds a special place in the actor’s family history, having served as his favorite retreat for many years.
